subject: Tilt Series: Does warp take imod local alignment into account?
body:
Dear all,
Hi, I've encountered a really weird issue with imod tilt series alignment, 
when I use imod's tilt command with no '-LOCALFILE' option to reconstruct, 
the output looks perfectly normal, but when I add the '-LOCALFILE' option, 
the output volumes are totally ruined. Since I copied every imod output 
file back to warp's directory, I'm wondering if warp takes imod local 
alignment file into account, while reconstructing sub-tomograms? If so, is 
there anything I can do to avoid this issue, or should I just run alignment 
again for all the tilt series?
Thank you very much in advance!
Cheers,
Linhua Tai
